missing_before_live: market session calendar and holiday source
tick size / price band / odd-lot rules
broker order id mapping and idempotency key
partial fill reconciliation against broker ledger
rate limit and retry policy by endpoint
live kill-switch and operator confirmation UX

required_adapter_methods.connect: 建立 session / websocket / callback channel
required_adapter_methods.place_order: 送出現股/融資/融券/零股單
required_adapter_methods.replace_order: 改價改量；若券商不支援需拆成 cancel+new

mandatory_checks: 現股 / 融資 / 融券 routing
recommended_extensions: pre-open / continuous / close auction session tagging
T+1 / T+2 settlement awareness for cash forecasting
